---
title: "Aunt Charlotte’s Stories of American History for the Little Ones. By Charlotte M. Yonge and H. Hastings Weld, D.D.."
---

## Aunt Charlotte’s Stories of American History for the Little Ones. By Charlotte M. Yonge and H. Hastings Weld, D.D..

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1883
**Genre:** Non-fiction: history
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London: Marcus Ward & Co., Chandos St, W.C. ; and at Belfast and New York

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
